stemHtml: In comparison to a conventional aerofoil section, typical shape characteristics of a supercritical aerofoil section are:

options.a: a larger nose radius, flatter lower surface and negative as well as positive camber.
options.b: a larger nose radius, flatter upper surface and negative as well as positive camber.
options.c: a sharper pointed nose, negative camber and a flatter upper surface.
options.d: a sharper pointed nose, flatter lower surface and positive camber at the rear of the aerofoil section.
